bird.context: Aeyes must not make Ben carry repeated context, vague status, or handoff translation.
bird.next_action: When incomplete work is discovered, emit exactly one successor artifact: receipt, blocker, or next packet.
bird.evidence_required: Every completion claim must link a receipt, blocker, or next packet.
bird.destination: TinkerDen shared packet and receipt lanes
bird.failure_condition: Ben has to explain the same thing twice, carry a message between Aeyes, ask what happened, or accept a proofless done.
